Implementation Note: Created `A.csv` using exact reproduced preprocessing. Stopwords, punctuation, casing, and ALL CAPS were kept.
Created `B.csv` from Version A using selective stopword removal while preserving negations.
Created stratified 80/10/10 splits for Version A and Version B using the same indices.
Defined four controlled experiments: BERTweet A/B and RoBERTa A/B.
Fine-tuned BERTweet on Version A and Version B with the same training setup.
Fine-tuned RoBERTa on Version A and Version B with the same training setup.
Evaluated all four models on the full held-out test set and generated metrics/confusion matrices.
Compared Version A vs Version B and found that keeping stopwords performed better for both models.
Ranked all four experiments using test macro-F1 as the main metric.
Analyzed false positives, false negatives, confidence patterns, text length, and surface features for the selected model.
Selected RoBERTa Version A as the final model based on test macro-F1.
Built a local Streamlit prediction demo.
Built an interactive dashboard showing the full AI/NLP workflow, reports, progress, and model demo.
Generated risk register, responsible-use checklist, and ethics/limitations summary.
Generated final report package and full GitHub README.
